api/Chartboost.Core.Consent.ConsentDialo.keywords: Enum ConsentDialogType The type of consent dialog to be presented to the user. Namespace: Chartboost.Core.Consent Assembly: com.chartboost.core.dll Syntax public enum ConsentDialogType Fields Name Description Concise A non-intrusive dialog used to collect consent, presenting a minimum amount of information. Detailed A dialog used to collect consent, presenting detailed information and possibly allowing for granular consent choices.

api/Chartboost.Core.Consent.ConsentStatu.title: Enum ConsentStatus | Chartboost Core Unity SDK
api/Chartboost.Core.Consent.ConsentStatu.keywords: Enum ConsentStatus User consent status. Namespace: Chartboost.Core.Consent Assembly: com.chartboost.core.dll Syntax public enum ConsentStatus Fields Name Description Denied Indicates the user denied consent. Granted Indicates the user granted consent. Unknown Indicates that the consent is unknown, possibly because the user was never asked for consent.

api/Chartboost.Core.Consent.ConsentStatu.keywords: Enum ConsentStatusSource The source of a consent status. Namespace: Chartboost.Core.Consent Assembly: com.chartboost.core.dll Syntax public enum ConsentStatusSource Fields Name Description Developer The consent was set by the developer without an explicit user action. User The consent was collected from the user as a result of an explicit user action.

api/Chartboost.Core.Consent.IConsentMana.title: Interface IConsentManagementPlatform | Chartboost Core Unity SDK
api/Chartboost.Core.Consent.IConsentMana.keywords: Interface IConsentManagementPlatform Chartboost Core’s CMP in charge of handling user consent management. Chartboost Core defines a unified API for publishers to request and query user consent, and relies on a 3rd-party CMP SDK to provide the CMP functionality. Namespace: Chartboost.Core.Consent Assembly: com.chartboost.core.dll Syntax public interface IConsentManagementPlatform Properties | Edit this page View Source ConsentStatus The current consent status determined by the CMP. Returns Unknown if no consent adapter module is available. Declaration ConsentStatus ConsentStatus { get; } Property Value Type Description ConsentStatus | Edit this page View Source Consents Detailed consent status for each consent standard, as determined by the CMP. Returns an empty dictionary if no consent adapter module is available. Declaration Dictionary<ConsentStandard, ConsentValue?> Consents { get; } Property Value Type Description Dictionary<ConsentStandard, ConsentValue> | Edit this page View Source PartnerConsentStatus A map of partner identifiers to their respective consent status. Declaration Dictionary<string, ConsentStatus> PartnerConsentStatus { get; } Property Value Type Description Dictionary<string, ConsentStatus> | Edit this page View Source ShouldCollectConsent Indicates whether the CMP has determined that consent should be collected from the user. Returns false if no consent adapter module is available. Declaration bool ShouldCollectConsent { get; } Property Value Type Description bool Methods | Edit this page View Source DenyConsent(ConsentStatusSource) Informs the CMP that the user has denied consent. This method should be used only when a custom consent dialog is presented to the user, thereby making the publisher responsible for the UI-side of collecting consent In most cases ShowConsentDialog(ConsentDialogType) should be used instead. Declaration Task<bool> DenyConsent(ConsentStatusSource source) Parameters Type Name Description ConsentStatusSource source The source of the new consent. See the ConsentStatusSource documentation for more info Returns Type Description Task<bool> Indicates if the operation went through successfully or not | Edit this page View Source GrantConsent(ConsentStatusSource) Informs the CMP that the user has granted consent. This method should be used only when a custom consent dialog is presented to the user, thereby making the publisher responsible for the UI-side of collecting consent In most cases ShowConsentDialog(ConsentDialogType) should be used instead. Declaration Task<bool> GrantConsent(ConsentStatusSource source) Parameters Type Name Description ConsentStatusSource source The source of the new consent. See the ConsentStatusSource documentation for more info Returns Type Description Task<bool> Indicates if the operation went through successfully or not | Edit this page View Source ResetConsent() Informs the CMP that the given consent should be reset. Informs the CMP that the given consent should be reset. If the CMP does not support the ResetConsent() function or the operation fails for any other reason, the Task is executed with a false parameter. Declaration Task<bool> ResetConsent() Returns Type Description Task<bool> Indicates if the operation went through successfully or not | Edit this page View Source ShowConsentDialog(ConsentDialogType) Instructs the CMP to present a consent dialog to the user for the purpose of collecting consent. Declaration Task<bool> ShowConsentDialog(ConsentDialogType dialogType) Parameters Type Name Description ConsentDialogType dialogType The type of consent dialog to present. See the ConsentDialogType documentation for more info. If the CMP does not support a given type, it should default to whatever type it does support. Returns Type Description Task<bool> Indicates if the operation went through successfully or not Events | Edit this page View Source ConsentChangeForStandard Called whenever the Consents value changed. Declaration event ChartboostConsentChangeForStandard ConsentChangeForStandard Event Type Type Description ChartboostConsentChangeForStandard | Edit this page View Source ConsentModuleReady Called when the initial values for ConsentStatus and Consents first become available for the current session. Declaration event Action ConsentModuleReady Event Type Type Description Action | Edit this page View Source ConsentStatusChange Called whenever the ConsentStatus value changed. Declaration event ChartboostConsentStatusChange ConsentStatusChange Event Type Type Description ChartboostConsentStatusChange | Edit this page View Source PartnerConsentStatusChange Called whenever the PartnerConsentStatus values changed. Declaration event ChartboostPartnerConsentStatusChange PartnerConsentStatusChange Event Type Type Description ChartboostPartnerConsentStatusChange

api/Chartboost.Core.Environment.Authoriz.title: Enum AuthorizationStatus | Chartboost Core Unity SDK
api/Chartboost.Core.Environment.Authoriz.keywords: Enum AuthorizationStatus The status values for app tracking authorization. As defined in Apple's Documentation Namespace: Chartboost.Core.Environment Assembly: com.chartboost.core.dll Syntax public enum AuthorizationStatus Fields Name Description Authorized The value that returns if the user authorizes access to app-related data for tracking the user or the device. Denied The value that returns if the user denies authorization to access app-related data for tracking the user or the device. NotDetermined The value that returns when the app can’t determine the user’s authorization status for access to app-related data for tracking the user or the device. Restricted The value that returns if authorization to access app-related data for tracking the user or the device has a restricted status. Unsupported The value that returns when Core is not running in an iOS environment.

api/Chartboost.Core.Utilities.html.title: Namespace Chartboost.Core.Utilities | Chartboost Core Unity SDK
api/Chartboost.Core.Utilities.html.keywords: Namespace Chartboost.Core.Utilities Classes AwaitableAndroidJavaProxy<TResult> This class can be used to implement any java interface.Any java vm method invocation matching the interface on the proxy object will automatically be passed to the c# implementation. Utilized to resolve awaitable APIs from Java/Kotlin integrations. BaseLater<TResult> Separated implementation so the derivations can offer different methods for completion EnvironmentSerialization Extension class to simplify serialization of Core environments. Later<TResult> Basic Later for passing a single type to callbacks and awaiters MainThreadDispatcher Utility class to dispatch functionality into Unity's main thread. If your code contains references to any Unity Code and not just raw C#, you will have to dispatch it to the Unity main thread. StringTypeConverter<TValue> Generic type converter for converting string to TValue (and other way around). StronglyTyped<TInnerType> Interfaces ILater For referencing ILater<TResult> generically ILater<TResult> Read-only interface for a standard Later<TResult> IStronglyTyped<T> Interface to make values strongly-typed with help of TypeConverters.

index.html.title: Chartboost Core Unity SDK | Chartboost Core Unity SDK
index.html.keywords: Chartboost Core Unity SDK Minimum Requirements Plugin Version Chartboost Core SDK 0.0.0+ Cocoapods 1.11.3+ iOS 11.0+ Xcode 14.1+ Android API 21+ Unity 2020.3.37f+ Integration Chartboost Core Unity SDK is distributed using the public npm registry as such it is compatible with the Unity Package Manager (UPM). In order to add the Chartboost Core Unity SDK to your project, just add the following to your Unity Project's manifest.json file. The scoped registry section is required in order to fetch packages from the NpmJS registry. "dependencies": { "com.chartboost.core": "0.2.0", ... }, "scopedRegistries": [ { "name": "NpmJS", "url": "https://registry.npmjs.org", "scopes": [ "com.chartboost" ] } ] Contributions We are committed to a fully transparent development process and highly appreciate any contributions. Our team regularly monitors and investigates all submissions for the inclusion in our official adapter releases. Refer to our CONTRIBUTING file for more information on how to contribute. License Refer to our LICENSE file for more information.
